setting.title: When enabled, documents such as Purchase Orders, Sale Orders, stock movements, and accounting entries can be synchronized between related companies based on the options selected below.
setting.help: Enable automated intercompany workflows between companies.

setting.title: Automatically create a Vendor Bill in the purchasing company when a Customer Invoice is posted in the selling company. Example: Company B posts a Customer Invoice for Company A. → A corresponding Vendor Bill is automatically generated in Company A.
setting.help: Automatically create a Vendor Bill from related intercompany Customer Invoice.

setting.title: Automatically create a Sales Order in the supplier company when an intercompany Purchase Order is confirmed. Example: Company A creates a Purchase Order to Company B. → A corresponding Sales Order is automatically created in Company B.
setting.help: Create a corresponding Sales Order for confirmed intercompany Purchase Orders.

setting.title: Automatically create a Purchase Order in the customer company when an intercompany Sales Order is confirmed. Example: Company B confirms a Sales Order for Company A. → A corresponding Purchase Order is automatically created in Company A.
setting.help: Create a corresponding Purchase Order for confirmed intercompany Sales Orders.

setting.title: When a delivery order is validated in the supplying company, the corresponding receipt in the receiving company is automatically updated with the quantities actually delivered, including partial deliveries.
